prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.4 kg; Height 168.2 cm; BMI 26.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.2%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 236mg/dL; 9 months ago 282mg/dL; 6 months ago 301mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.8kg; 9 months ago 73.2kg; 6 months ago 69.8kg; 3 months ago 69.8kg; current 74.4kg), Height (12 months ago 168.2cm; 9 months ago 168.2cm; 6 months ago 168.2cm; 3 months ago 168.2cm; current 168.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 125mg/g; 9 months ago 123mg/g; 6 months ago 194mg/g; 3 months ago 204mg/g; current 202mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
